name: budgetary
description: Pre-flight, probabilistic token-spend estimate (range, scenario, confidence) for a coding task.

interface.shortDescription: Pre-flight token-spend estimates for coding tasks.
interface.longDescription: Adds an `estimate` tool (and an estimate skill) that returns a probabilistic token-spend estimate — a token range, a scenario label, and a confidence score — for a coding task before you run it, so you can decide whether it is worth the spend.
defaultPrompt: Estimate how many tokens it will take to refactor the payments module.
